queries.query: Ask Codex to review the changes Cursor just made.
Get a second opinion from Codex on this branch before I open the PR.
Have Codex review commit abc123 for regressions.
Ask Codex what it thinks about this migration plan — does the rollback path hold up?
Ask Codex what recurring mistakes it keeps making across my projects and what feedback I keep repeating.
Prepare the Codex prompt and command to review my changes, but don't run it yet.
Codex keeps failing — check my Codex auth and sandbox setup.
What would the other LLM provider say about this API boundary? Run it past Codex.
Refactor this React component to use hooks.
Harden this repo's AGENTS.md and add pre-commit hooks for coding agents.
Audit our CLI's developer experience and score the friction.
Get a second opinion on this architecture decision from a different model.
